title: QIAamp DNA Blood Mini Kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9lhiu","text":"Protocol was adapted from the QIAamp DNA Blood Mini Kit - Qiagen catalog number: 51104","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"93qk4","text":"QIAamp Mini spin columns and buffers can be stored dry at room temperature (15–25°C) for up to 1 year without showing any reduction in performance. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"27n9f","text":"Lyophilized QIAGEN Protease can be stored at room temperature for up to 12 months without any decrease in performance. For storage longer than 12 months or if ambient temperatures constantly exceed 25°C, QIAGEN Protease should be stored dry at 2–8°C.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lhou","text":"QIAGEN Protease reconstituted in Buffer AVE, Protease Solvent and Protease Suspension buffer is stable for 12 months when stored at 2–8°C. Keeping the QIAGEN Protease stock solution at room temperature for prolonged periods of time should be avoided.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"wpe3s","text":"Wear a lab coat, face mask, eye protection and nitrile gloves while extracting DNA from blood.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e8qsm","text":"All centrifugation performed @ 6000 x g for 1 min. unless otherwise specified.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1sr2l","text":"All steps done at room temperature unless specified.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"wqtp4","text":"Microcentrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amctv","text":"Pipettor (50–200 µL; 100–1000 µL)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6auqu","text":"Water bath or heating block heated to 56°C.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pipet 20 µL of QIAGEN Protease into the bottom of a 1.7 mL microfuge tube.
Add the appropriate amounts of ethanol (96-100%) to Buffer AW1 and Buffer AW2 concentrates.
Pipet 1.2 mL protease solvent into the vial containing lyophilized QIAGEN Protease, as indicated on the label, and store at 4°C (top shelf of door of refrigerator).
Equilibrate samples to room temperature.
Heat a water bath or heating block to 56°C.
If a precipitate has formed in Buffer AL, dissolving by incubating at 56°C.
Add 200 µL whole blood to the tube.
Add 200 µL Buffer AL to the sample. Mix by pulse-vortexing for 15 sec.
Incubate at 56°C for 10 min.
Briefly centrifuge the tube to remove drops from the lid.
Add 200 µL ethanol to the sample and mix again by pulse-vortexing for 15 sec.
Briefly centrifuge the tube to remove drops from the lid.
Close the cap and centrifuge at 6000 x g for 1 min. Place the column in a new collection tube and discard tube containing the flowthrough.
Add 500 µL Buffer AW1 without wetting the rim. Centrifuge at 6000 x g for 1 min. Place the column in a clean 2 mL collection tube and discard the collection tube containing the flowthrough.
Add 500 µL Buffer AW2 without wetting the rim. Centrifuge at full speed for 3 min.
Place the column in a new collection tube (not provided) and discard tube containing the flowthrough. Centrifuge at full speed for 1 min.
Incubate at RT for 5 min.
Centrifuge column at 6000 x g for 1 min.
Pipet eluted DNA into the QC tube ( 5 µL /tube), and the library aliquot tube ( 50 µL /tube).
Place the column in a labeled 1.7 mL microfuge tube (not provided) and add 200 µL Buffer AE or distilled water.
Store all tubes at -80°C.
Using sample in QC tube, determine DNA concentration with dsDNA HS Qubit Assay kit.
Note: Buffer AL contains guanidine hydrochloride so DO NOT combine with bleach.
Carefully apply the sample to QIAamp Mini spin column in a 2 mL collection tube without wetting the rim.
Note: Column may be centrifuged at higher speed if the entire sample has not passed through the column.
creator: Hunter Olson
